opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The itching is absolute torture the second I get into bed. I have scratched my arms and stomach completely raw, and now my wife has started itching too.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Unbearable night-time itch, scratched raw, and now my spouse is itching too.

symptom_narrative.onset: insidious itch 3 weeks ago, agonising for 5 days
symptom_narrative.character: intense generalised itch with scratched-raw skin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: torture at night; no sleep for 72h
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: wrists, armpits, around the navel, thighs and genitals
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tiny thread-like tracks in the finger webs, itchy lumps on the scrotum, spouse now itching; no fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: shares a bed and living spaces with spouse (who is now itching)

objective_data_offered.value: scratched-raw itchy bumps on wrists, armpits, around the navel and thighs; tiny thread-like greyish tracks in the finger webs; itchy lumps on the scrotum; head/neck spared
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; dermoscopy/close inspection limited remotely
